message: run_eval.wls produced no usable eval_output.json (cause: unbound_model_parameters).
user_instruction: run_eval.wls is specialised to the 2HDM+a (TwoHdmAfix) model and cannot bind this model's amplitude symbols. Generalising the substitution/projection/matching layer off TwoHdmAfix is roadmap step 3 (LOOP-FLOOR-ROADMAP.md).
